name: Old Town
description: UNESCO World Heritage site with cobblestone streets and historic architecture

name: Riga Cathedral
description: The largest medieval church in the Baltic states with stunning architecture

name: House of Blackheads
description: Iconic Renaissance building with distinctive architecture in Old Town

name: Freedom Monument
description: Towering monument representing Latvia's independence and freedom

name: Latvian National Museum of Art
description: Extensive collection of Latvian and international art spanning centuries

name: St. Peter's Church
description: Tallest church in Old Town with panoramic views from the tower

name: Daugava River
description: Historic river that shaped the city's development and commerce

name: Kronvald Park
description: Beautiful urban park popular for recreation and relaxation

name: Riga Central Market
description: Vibrant marketplace with traditional Estonian, Latvian, and Lithuanian goods

name: Three Brothers Houses
description: Three historic townhouses representing different architectural styles through centuries
